entities.description: The country where the study on sorghum farmers was conducted

entities.description: Agricultural technologies designed to improve sorghum production

entities.description: Smallholder individuals cultivating sorghum in Tanzania

entities.description: Statistical method used to summarize the adoption rates of technologies

entities.description: Econometric model used to identify factors influencing the adoption of technologies

entities.description: Economic analysis used to evaluate the profitability of grain production

entities.description: High-yielding or stress-tolerant sorghum seed varieties

entities.name: INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to kill insects affecting sorghum

entities.name: INORGANIC FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Synthetic nutrients applied to soil to increase sorghum yield

entities.name: THRESHING MACHINE
entities.description: Mechanical equipment used to separate grain from the straw

entities.name: OPTIMUM SEED RATE
entities.description: The ideal amount of seed planted per unit area for maximum yield

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The financial gain obtained from sorghum grain production

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INPUTS
